title: Permafrost Thaw
script_summary: Exploring the science behind permafrost thaw and its implications.

segments.voiceover: Science has a clearer story about permafrost thaw than social media does.
Permafrost is frozen ground that holds massive amounts of carbon. As it thaws, surprising things happen.
When permafrost thaws, it releases methane—a potent greenhouse gas. This can accelerate climate change.
Studies show that this process is already underway, but scientists are still mapping its full impact.
In short, permafrost thaw is a complex issue. It brings risks, but also opportunities for innovation in climate solutions.
Curious about more science insights? Hit like, share, and follow for more! #earth #science
